goal: createTask + completeTask (через UoW → grantTaskXp → applyLevelProgress) + archiveTask
acceptance: complete-task.use-case.ts: UoW transaction → mark done → grant XP → apply level progress (атомарно)
archive-task.use-case.ts: soft delete (status→archived, не hard DELETE)
Idempotent completeTask: повторный call на done task НЕ начисляет XP второй раз (status guard)
Ports (TaskRepositoryPort, ProfileRepositoryPort, UnitOfWorkPort) определены в core/ports/
Tests покрывают: happy path completeTask, idempotency, UoW rollback на failure
notes: Challenge-gate: Codex challenger проверяет nested UoW запрет, idempotency completeTask, no infrastructure imports. file_count_max=10 > 5 → challenge trigger.
